name: fux e.G.
notes:
fux eG is a registered co-operative from Hamburg, Germany. Our goal is to provide affordable space for socially minded non-profit organizations, artists and small local businesses. Therefore we bought an old building in Hamburg and are currently renovating it.

Since we want to build this space for a long future we asked ISPs for a internet connection. After 6 months of research we got 1 offer for 50/10 VDSL. So we started to build our own 'ISP'.

If you would like to help a socially minded group with peering or transit please contact us. And don't be afraid the network is run by professional network engineers who think this a project worth to be supported.
